institution.name: University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff are 21% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($35.5k vs $45.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 1.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.3k → $18.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (26.1% → 22.7%).
